## Scope check

Agentlink is deliberately narrow: symlink instruction files across AI
tools, no code generation, no MCP config, no template engine. If your
request falls outside that scope, say so explicitly and explain why it
still belongs here.

- [ ] Fits within the symlinks-only scope
- [ ] Does not require a new runtime dependency
- [ ] Does not break upstream compatibility with `martinmose/agentlink`
